mapper.select: SELECT su.username, su.nickname, tena.`status`, tena.sort, JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'projectId', tenar.project_id, 'examAttemptType', tenar.exam_attempt_type ) ) AS project_exam_list_json FROM ted_examinee_notice_apply tena LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON tena.examinee_id = su.id LEFT JOIN ted_examinee_notice_apply_record tenar ON tena.id = tenar.apply_id AND tenar.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.customSqlSegment} GROUP BY tena.id, su.username, su.nickname, tena.`status` ORDER BY tena.sort ASC
